name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, flag, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ flag = [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = p
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
          /\ \A q \in 1..N : q # p => state[q] # "critical"
          /\ \A q \in 1..N : q # p => flag[q] = FALSE
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag, turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, flag, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants, Coordinator
VARIABLES coordinator, participants, state


vars == << participants, coordinator >>

Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> [state |-> "INIT"]]
       /\ coordinator = [state |-> "INIT"]

Prepare == /\ coordinator.state = "INIT"
          /\ coordinator.state' = "PREPARE"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "PREPARE"

VoteYes == /\ coordinator.state = "PREPARE"
          /\ coordinator.state' = "VOTEYES"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "VOTEYES"

VoteNo == /\ coordinator.state = "PREPARE"
          /\ coordinator.state' = "VOTENO"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "VOTENO"

Commit == /\ coordinator.state = "VOTEYES"
          /\ coordinator.state' = "COMMIT"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "COMMIT"

Abort == /\ coordinator.state = "VOTENO"
          /\ coordinator.state' = "ABORT"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "ABORT"

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

\* State of each philosopher: "thinking", "hungry", or "eating"
VARIABLES philosophers, forks, TLC, i

Init == /\ philosophers = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]
        /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> TRUE]  \* TRUE means fork i is free

\* Helper: philosopher i's left and right forks
leftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
rightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

\* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry
Hungry(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "thinking"
            /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
            /\ forks' = forks

\* Action: philosopher i starts eating if both forks are free
Eat(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[leftFork(i)] /\ forks[rightFork(i)]
          /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![leftFork(i)] = FALSE,
                                      ![rightFork(i)] = FALSE]

\* Action: philosopher i finishes eating and puts down forks
Finish(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "eating"
             /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
             /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![leftFork(i)] = TRUE,
                                     ![rightFork(i)] = TRUE]

\* Next-state relation: any philosopher can become hungry, start eating, or finish eating
Next == \E i \in 1..N:
          (Hungry(i) \/ Eat(i) \/ Finish(i))

\* Fairness: each philosopher eventually gets to eat
Fairness == WF_vars(Next)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars /\ Fairness

\* Type correctness invariant
TypeOK == /\ philosophers \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ forks \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

\* Safety property: no two adjacent philosophers eat simultaneously
NoDeadlock == \A i \in 1..N: philosophers[i] # "eating" \/ philosophers[leftFork(i)] # "eating"

\* Liveness property: each philosopher eventually eats
\* (This is a liveness property, not a safety property)
\* We can check this property using TLC's fairness checking.
\* Alternatively, we can express it as a temporal logic formula:
\*   [](<> (philosophers[i] = "eating"))
\* for each philosopher i.
\* This property is not checkable by TLC because it is a liveness property.
\* However, we can express it as a temporal logic formula:
\*   [](<> (philosophers[i] = "eating"))
\* for each philosopher i.
\* This property is not checkable by TLC because it is a liveness property.
\* However, we can express it as a temporal logic formula:
\*   [](<> (philosophers[i] = "eating"))
\* for each philosopher i.
\* This property is not checkable by TLC because it is a liveness property.

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => flag[j] = FALSE
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num[j] = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q[tail] = 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<head>>

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q[head] = 1
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<tail>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> {0,1}]

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ state[i] = "Follower"
             /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
             /\ votedFor' = votedFor
             /\ state' = state
          \/ /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
             /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
             /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
             /\ state' = state
          \/ /\ state[i] = "Leader"
             /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
             /\ votedFor' = votedFor
             /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in [1..N -> {NULL} \cup 1..N]
          /\ state \in [1..N -> {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}]

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>> 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) :
        /\ readers[r] = TRUE
        /\ readers' = Replace(readers, r, FALSE)
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) :
        /\ readers[r] = FALSE
        /\ readers' = Replace(readers, r, TRUE)
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[r] = FALSE
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE
     /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Channels, InitState, InitChannelState
VARIABLES channelState, state


vars == <<state, channelState>>

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> InitState[p]]
        /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> InitChannelState[c]]

Next == /\ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = NextState(state[p])]
          /\ channelState' = channelState
        \/ \E c \in Channels :
          /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = NextChannelState(channelState[c])]
          /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> InitState[1..N]]
          /\ channelState \in [Channels -> InitChannelState[Channels]]
====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES token


vars == <<token>>

Init == token = 1

Next == token' = %(token, N) + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store


vars == <<store>>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == 
  /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
        /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<>>
  \/ \E k \in Keys :
        /\ UNCHANGED <<store>>
        /\ store[k] # NULL
           /\ \E v \in Values : store[k] = v

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]
  /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values \cup {NULL}

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [promised \in 1..N |-> 0, accepted \in 1..N |-> 0, value \in V : 0]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot \in 1..N |-> 0, value \in V |-> 0]]
  /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p, a) == 
  /\ acceptors[a].promised <= proposers[p].ballot
  /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a].promised = proposers[p].ballot]
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Promise(p, a) == 
  /\ acceptors[a].promised = proposers[p].ballot
  /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p].value = acceptors[a].value]
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p, a) == 
  /\ acceptors[a].promised = proposers[p].ballot
  /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a].accepted = proposers[p].ballot, ![a].value = proposers[p].value]
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accepted(p, a) == 
  /\ acceptors[a].accepted = proposers[p].ballot
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ chosen' = acceptors[a].value

Next == 
  /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N : Prepare(p, a)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N : Promise(p, a)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N : Accept(p, a)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N : Accepted(p, a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [promised \in 1..N, accepted \in 1..N, value \in V]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot \in 1..N, value \in V]]
  /\ chosen \in V

THEOREM Spec => []TypeOK
THEOREM Spec => []chosen \in V

THEOREM Spec => <>chosen \in V

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

        /\ ackedChunks = {}
        /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 0]

SendChunk(i) == /\ i \notin sentChunks
                /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
                /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
                /\ UNCHANGED <<ackedChunks>>

AckChunk(i) == /\ i \in sentChunks
              /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {i}
              /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

RetransmitChunk(i) == /\ i \in sentChunks
                     /\ i \notin ackedChunks
                     /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
                     /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
                     /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, ackedChunks>>

Next == \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) :
          \/ SendChunk(i)
          \/ AckChunk(i)
          \/ RetransmitChunk(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

TypeOK == /\ sentChunks \subseteq 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
          /\ ackedChunks \subseteq 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
          /\ retransmitCount \in (1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Nat)

====
